title: Profile
signInBlurb: Sign in with Google to link your email to scores you claim, add friends, and sync favorites.
nicknamePlaceholder: Optional — shown instead of full name
nicknameHint: Leave blank to use your full name on feeds and boards. Must be unique (letters including accents, numbers, spaces, - or _). 2–30 characters.
countryHint: Shown as a flag next to your name.
countryHintRest: lists top pours this week from everyone who chose this same country on their profile.
signOutConfirmDescription: You'll need to sign in again to manage your profile, friends, and favorites.
msgSignInFallback: We couldn't start Google sign-in. Try again in a moment.
msgNicknameRules: Nickname: 2–30 characters, letters (including accents), numbers, spaces, hyphen or underscore.
msgCountryInvalid: Choose a country from the list, or leave it unset.
msgNicknameTaken: That nickname is already taken. Try another.
msgEnterBarName: Enter a bar name or pick from suggestions.
msgAlreadyFriends: You are already friends with that email.
msgInvitePendingEmailFail: Request already pending, but email invite failed: {error}
msgInviteSavedEmailFail: Request saved, but email invite failed: {error}
msgInvitePendingNoEmail: Request already pending, but email invite failed.
msgInviteSavedNoEmail: Request saved, but email invite failed.
msgFriendPendingResent: Friend request already pending. Invite email sent again.
msgFriendAccepted: Friend request accepted. You're now friends.
msgInviteCancelFail: Couldn't cancel that invite. Refresh the page, then try again after applying the latest database migration (withdrawn status for friend requests).
progressNoFriends: Add friends on the Friends tab to compare pours here.
favoritesSectionBlurb: Save pubs you visit; we use Places for accurate addresses.
favoritesAddressHint: Choose a suggestion when possible so we store the full address.
friendsBlurb: Invite people by email from here. If they create an account later with that same email, they'll see the pending friend request and any competition invites. They still choose whether to accept the friendship or join the competition.
friendsYourFriendsBlurb: Accepted friends appear here with a quick performance snapshot.
friendsEmptyAccepted: No accepted friends yet. Send a few requests above.
expensesEmptyScores: No scores linked to this email yet. Claim a pour and add a pint price to track spend here.
expensesIntroBlurb: Spend totals use pint prices you enter on pours (optional field). Figures below are from your recent linked scores loaded in this session.
expensesSpendTrackedHint: Sum of pint prices you entered on pours (only pours with a price count toward this total).
expensesRecentPricedBlurb: Tap through to the full score. Add or edit price from the pour flow if you skipped it.
expensesNoPricesYet: No prices on your recent pours yet. Next time you split, add the pint price to build a spend history.
scoresEmptyBlurb: No scores linked to this email yet. Claim a pour to start a score log.
progressFriendLeaderboardBlurb: Compare your average, best score, and volume against accepted friends.
progressEmptyLeaderboardHint: Accept a few friends to unlock side-by-side progress comparisons.
progressNoScoresClaimBlurb: No scores linked to this email yet. Open a result you own and tap "Claim with Google".
mobileGuestBlurb: Sign in with Google to link pours to your profile, compare with friends, save favorite bars, and track spend from pint prices.
mobileGuestTeaser: Progress, scores, favorites, and expenses unlock after you sign in.
mobileHubLeaderboardSolo: Add friends on the Friends tab to see weekly rankings.
mobileHubLeaderboardNoScores: Log a pour this week to appear on the board.
mobileHubLeaderboardTop: You're leading your friends on weekly average.
achievementUnlockBlurb: Keep pouring to climb tiers and fill the board.
achievementShareText: I unlocked “{name}” on Split the G.
achievementShareFailed: Couldn’t copy the link. Try sharing from your browser menu.
mobileHubExpensesEmpty: Add pint prices on pours to track spend
mobileHubFaqSub: Answers about scores, friends, and your account
mobileHubScoresFlagHint: Set your country under Edit to show your flag here
gamificationBlurb: Unlock badges by pouring consistently and exploring more pubs.
achievementsPageBlurb: All badges use your linked pours. New unlocks appear here after your next pour syncs.
badgeWeeklyStreak4: Weekly Regular (4 weeks in a row)
badgeProgressEarly: Pour once before 5 PM (your local time)
scoreHistoryBlurb: Recent trend of your pour scores (latest on the right).
scoreInsightsPanelBlurb: Quick guide to the stats shown in this section.
scoreInsightsHistoryBody: Shows your most recent pours with date and score so you can spot short-term form changes.
scoreInsightsMomentumBody: Difference between your latest score and the one before it. Positive means improving.
scoreInsightsConsistencyBody: Standard deviation (sigma) of your scores. Lower means steadier pours.
scoreInsightsDistributionBody: How your pours are spread across score bands (count and percentage).
scoreInsightsBandBody: The score range where you land most often. Useful for setting your next target.
